release_notes:
Alpha 4.0.10.19 - 2026-05-11 - 3 critical fixes from Génesis
2026-05-11.

1. CRITICAL: VIES validator option was MISSING on the SAP Report >
VATify Template tab. Génesis ticked VIES on the Enhance tab and
it worked, but the same toggle did not exist on the Batch flow.
Added the matching pair "Run VIES validation" + sub-toggle
"↳ Also check domestic / non-EU codes" to the Batch options
panel. `_batch_vies_var` and `_batch_vies_domestic_var` are now
in ENHANCE_OPTION_KEYS so the choice persists per profile.
`write_preliminary_review` gains `run_vies_check`,
`vies_include_domestic` and `vies_include_non_eu` kwargs; the
runner runs BEFORE the column reformatter so headers / widths
get the same polish as legacy VIES columns.

2. VERY CRITICAL: Every Enhance run crashed with
`AttributeError: '_tkinter.tkapp' object has no attribute
'_enhance_log'`. The 4.0.10.14 truncation of gui_app.py orphaned
the `_enhance_log` method while leaving 20+ call sites in
`gui_enhance_mixin.py` pointing at it. Restored `_enhance_log` on
`EnhanceTabMixin`: routes through the shared `_append_log` so
timestamps and colour tags match the batch / reviewer log boxes;
falls back to the global `_log` when the textbox is not yet
built so messages are never lost.

3. CRITICAL: the Enhance log textbox itself was invisible. Root
cause same as #2 — the truncation left
`self._enhance_log_box` half-built (literally cut off at
`self._enhance_lo`). 4.0.10.17 appended the missing tail to
finish the textbox; 4.0.10.19 confirms the wiring end-to-end via
the new `_enhance_log` method.

Suite total: 163 passed, 4 skipped.
